commands.review_summary:
The PR adds GatewayClient close-state metadata, uses it to classify accepted-before-hello probe closes as reachable, and renders sanitized typed gateway-close diagnostics in doctor health and daemon flows with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +121. Total +156 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main settles a pre-hello close before setting connectLatencyMs, so downstream probe and doctor diagnostics can classify an accepted-but-errored gateway as unreachable or not running.
